results.rendered_html:
kauve(be)ra a. (rī f.) [kuverasyedaṃ aṇ]
1 Belonging to or coming from Kubera; yānaṃ sasmāra kauberaṃ  R. 15. 45. 
— rī The north (the direction presided over by Kubera); tataḥ pratasthe kauverīṃ bhāsvāniva raghurdiśaṃ  R. 4. 66. 
2 The Śakti or female energy of Kubera.
